title: penstemon laetus var. roezlii
intro: Penstemon laetus var. roezlii, also known as Blue-eyed Mary, is a flowering plant species native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reducing pain. The health benefits of Penstemon laetus var. roezlii include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to limited scientific research on its safety and efficacy.
